about.title: About Me
about.description1: Hi! I am Fahrul Nurdiansyah, a web developer passionate about transforming complex ideas into elegant and functional web applications. My digital journey began when I started college in 2022, and since then, I have never stopped learning and exploring new technologies.
about.description2: I truly enjoy the problem-solving process and collaborating within a team to create solutions that have a positive impact. For me, coding is not just about writing lines of code, but about building bridges between people and technology.
about.description3: Beyond coding, I believe in the importance of good communication, time management, and continuous learning. With a combination of technical skills and soft skills, I strive to deliver solutions that not only work but also provide the best experience for users.

tanyaArul.title: tanyaArul
tanyaArul.description: A web-based question and answer assistant built with React and Gemini AI.

ruligamelist.title: RuliGameList
ruligamelist.description: A Game Discovery Portal built to explore modern frontend data management.

voiceAssistant.title: Ruli - Voice Assistants
voiceAssistant.description: Ruli: A Python virtual assistant for voice commands, Wikipedia search, opening websites, and playing music.

library.title: Library Web
library.description: A simple web application designed to facilitate the management of book data and borrowing activities in a library.

ruliLearningLaravel.title: RuliLearning
ruliLearningLaravel.description: A Laravel-based LMS web application for free and premium learning materials, using Midtrans for payments and sending confirmation emails.

ruliKlinik.title: RuliKlinik
ruliKlinik.description: RuliKlinik is a Laravel web application for clinic management, featuring patient registration via email, admin data management, and soft deletes.

vetrack.title: VeTrack
vetrack.description: Web application for centralized monitoring, management, and ordering of mining service vehicle fleets.

ruliConnect.title: RuliConnect
ruliConnect.description: A social platform for personal branding, content sharing, and real-time interaction with a modern UI.
